name: MetalNRG plc
summary: MetalNRG plc, a natural resource investing company, invests in, explores for, and develops various mineral properties. It owns interest in the Gold Ridge project comprising approximately 2,305 acres of tenement, including 343 acres of patented mining claims, 112 company-owned un-patented mining claims, and 12 leased un-patented mining claims located in Arizona, the United States. The company was formerly known as ZimNRG PLC and changed its name to MetalNRG plc in March 2016. MetalNRG plc was incorporated in 2006 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
